description: Image-capable horizontal WPF UI Card for a desktop hero, product tile, or curated collection. It remains useful without an image by combining a theme-aware media surface with one pack-owned symbol slot.

description.description: Supporting editorial copy displayed below the title.

eyebrow.description: Short category or collection label displayed above the title.

margin.description: Outer spacing around the editorial Card, using WPF Thickness syntax.

maxWidth.description: Maximum width of the complete horizontal editorial surface in device-independent pixels.

mediaAutomationName.description: Accessible name for the image or fallback media surface.

mediaBackground.description: Theme-coordinated WPF brush used behind the optional image and fallback symbol.

mediaCornerRadius.description: Corner radius applied to the media surface, using WPF CornerRadius syntax.

mediaHeight.description: Minimum media-surface height in device-independent pixels.

mediaSource.description: Optional binding expression that resolves to a project-owned ImageSource or URI. Omit it and populate the media slot for a deterministic theme-aware symbol fallback; avoid remote sources for offline apps.
mediaSource.previewWarning: Preview can prove bound image layout only when the isolated host resolves the same project-owned data. Always verify the final built application.

mediaStretch.description: How the optional image fills the media surface.

mediaWidth.description: Width of the media column in device-independent pixels.

minHeight.description: Minimum height of the complete editorial Card in device-independent pixels.

padding.description: Inner spacing around the text, custom content, and actions, using WPF Thickness syntax.

actions.description: Optional WPF UI actions displayed in a horizontal row below the editorial content.

content.description: Optional pack-neutral details, metadata, price, status, or supporting controls displayed before the actions.

media.description: Optional single WPF UI symbol centered over the media background as a deterministic fallback behind bound media.

sourceHints.usage: pack-owned editorial composition built on the WPF UI Card surface
